title: fabric-archive SKILL.md — Phase 0.0 outcome-based re-scan filter + 12h anti-loop
description: Extend Phase 0.0 Cross-Session Digest collection to consult `session_archive_attempted` events (new schema variant from TASK-01) as the authority for 'which sessions have been processed by archive'. For each candidate session: (1) check the most-recent session_archive_attempted event; (2) outcome=user_dismissed → permanently skip from auto-re-scan; (3) other outcomes → check covered_through_ts vs current max event ts AND look for high-value signal (plan_context/edit/normative-keyword) in the new events; (4) apply 12h cooldown — same session skipped if last attempted ts is within 12h.

files.change:
(1) After existing step 4 (Load digests), insert new step 4.5: 'Filter via session_archive_attempted ledger'. (2) New filter algorithm:
  - For each session_id collected in steps 1-3:
    a. Find most recent session_archive_attempted event matching this session_id
    b. If found AND outcome === 'user_dismissed' → drop from candidate set (permanent skip)
    c. If found AND (nowMs - attempted_event.ts) < 12h → drop (cooldown)
    d. If found AND covered_through_ts present:
       - Scan events.jsonl for THIS session_id WHERE ts > covered_through_ts
       - Check for high-value signal: ≥1 knowledge_context_planned OR ≥1 edit_paths event (looked-up via plan-context.ts emission)  OR ≥1 normative keyword in latest assistant_turn_observed
       - No high-value signal → drop (no new content worth re-scanning)
       - Has high-value signal → keep
    e. If session_archive_attempted NEVER found for this session_id → keep (first-time scan)
  - Resulting filtered session_id[] proceeds to digest loading (existing step 4).
(3) Document the constants: ANTI_LOOP_HOURS = 12 (same心智 as hook cooldown), HIGH_VALUE_EVENT_TYPES = ['knowledge_context_planned', 'edit_paths_recorded'], NORMATIVE_KEYWORDS = ['以后','always','never','from now on','下次','记一下','永远不要'].

implementation: Read current Phase 0.0 (L124-L161) for structural understanding.
Insert new step 4.5 (Filter via session_archive_attempted) with the full algorithm.
Document the 12h ANTI_LOOP_HOURS constant + rationale (心智对齐 hook cooldown).

Update the existing 'Graceful degradation' paragraph (L158-L161) to mention: 'If session_archive_attempted events are missing entirely (pre-rc.25 ledger or rotation), treat all sessions as never-attempted (current default behavior).'

Add 2 worked examples illustrating the filter:
  - Session X has user_dismissed → permanently skipped
  - Session Y has proposed outcome 6h ago → cooldown skip
  - Session Z has viability_failed outcome 14h ago + 3 new plan_context events → keep for re-scan

reference.pattern: Existing Phase 0.0 watermark-based scan (rc.7 T5) — new logic layers on top without removing existing semantics
reference.examples: Phase 0.5 viability gate (L312-L397) is the precedent for multi-signal filter logic with explicit constants.

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure SKILL.md prose change — AI applies the filter algorithm at runtime by reading events.jsonl. No code change needed since events.jsonl access is via existing Bash tool. The outcome-based state machine + cooldown is the structural fix for 'no record of which sessions have been archived'.
alternatives_considered: Per-session cache file (rejected per Q3.2 — events.jsonl is single source of truth)
Time-based only filter without outcome consideration (rejected: user_dismissed sessions would still be re-proposed)
LLM semantic judgment of 'is this new content worth re-scanning' (rejected: too expensive, deterministic signal filter is faster + auditable)
decision_factors: Backward-compat free (missing events.jsonl events → existing behavior)
12h心智 aligned with hook cooldown reduces user confusion
rationale.tradeoffs: Pure assistant_turn_observed accumulation does NOT trigger re-scan (avoids chat noise pulling re-scans up); chat-only guideline signals must come through E3 self-trigger path instead.

manual_checks: Dogfood: invoke /fabric-archive on a session where Phase 0.0 had previously processed → verify filter skip happens
Dogfood: invoke on a session with user_dismissed outcome → verify permanent skip
success_metrics: Constants ANTI_LOOP_HOURS, HIGH_VALUE_EVENT_TYPES, NORMATIVE_KEYWORDS all documented verbatim
integration: Manual dogfood validates filter behavior across 3 outcome states

criteria: SKILL.md Phase 0.0 contains exact string 'Filter via session_archive_attempted ledger'
SKILL.md contains exact string 'user_dismissed' AND 'permanent skip'
SKILL.md graceful degradation paragraph mentions pre-rc.25 ledger compat
Commit msg: 'feat(rc25): Phase 0.0 outcome-based re-scan filter (TASK-05)'
